working: loadSpotifyToken(): reads .spotify-token.json on startup, sets spotifyUserToken if not expired, auto-refreshes if refresh_token present
saveSpotifyToken(): writes token + refresh_token + expires_at to .spotify-token.json
refreshSpotifyToken(): uses refresh_token to get new access_token, saves to disk
saveSpotifyToken() called in /spotify-callback after successful OAuth exchange
loadSpotifyToken() called in server.listen startup callback
partial: .spotify-token.json does not exist yet — need one OAuth round to seed it
Once seeded: token survives all future pm2 restarts via auto-refresh
REQUIRES MANUAL SQL: ALTER TABLE reference_tracks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS genre_tag text, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS playlist_name text;
REQUIRES MANUAL SQL: ALTER TABLE projects ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reference_links jsonb DEFAULT '[]';

OPTIONAL SQL: ALTER TABLE reference_tracks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tonal_balance jsonb, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stereo_width float, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stereo_width_per_band jsonb, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS crest_factor_per_band jsonb;
next: Open http://127.0.0.1:4242/spotify-auth ONE TIME to seed .spotify-token.json. After that, all restarts will auto-load the token. Check pm2 logs for '✓ Spotify token saved to disk' after OAuth.
notes: Token file at momentum-watcher directory root (.spotify-token.json). 1-minute expiry buffer built in. refresh_token is persisted so expired tokens auto-refresh without user interaction.
